headline: AAON, Stock Of The Day, Jumps Near Buy Point As AI Backlog Booms 160%
summary: AI data center supplier AAON is IBD Stock Of The Day after blowout earnings earlier in May and amid an industry conference on Tuesday. AAON stock flashed a bullish signal on Tuesday near a buy point. At Tuesday's William Blair Growth Stock conference, CEO Matt Tobolski and CFO Andy Cheung underscored the structural drivers behind AAON stock's 92% rally so far in 2026.
